chapter_title.en: Chapter 7 – Rewards for the recitation of the Quran

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/497)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/497)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) خَتْمُ الْقُرْآنِ إِلَى حَيْثُ تَعْلَمُ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> heard my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Completion of the Quran is up to where you know’’.
en.sarwar: 7. Mansur has narrated from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘The Messenger of Allah has said, “Complete reading of the Holy Quran is reading to the extent that you know.’”
